name: Witch Hazel
description: A botanical extract from Hamamelis virginiana containing tannins and gallic acid, providing astringent, anti-inflammatory, and mild antimicrobial properties.
chemicalName: Complex botanical extract; key components: hamamelitannin, gallic acid, catechins
formula: Mixture; hamamelitannin: C₂₀H₂₀O₁₄; gallic acid: C₇H₆O₅
appearance: Clear to slightly yellow liquid (distillate); mild, slightly astringent herbaceous scent
solubility: Miscible with water; active compounds are water-soluble
chemistry: Tannins + gallic acid — astringent, anti-inflammatory. Good roll-on deodorant base.
